rulings.Case Title: PETER GALASSI et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 11, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT IMO INDUSTRIES INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DECEDENT IDENTIFIES DEFENDANT'S PRODUCT AND THE ORIGINAL PRODUCT CONTAINED ASBESTOS. (PLAINTIFF'S FACT 26 AND 27). WITHOUT SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, DEFENDANT IS UNABLE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: PETER GALASSI et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 11, 2008 LINE 4. DEFENDANT FOSTER WHEELER, L.L.C.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. DEFENDANT HAS FAILED TO COMPLY CALIFORNIA RULE OF COURT 3.1350. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE COURT IS NOT REQUIRED TO REVIEW EACH OF THE PLAINTIFF'S INTERROGATORY RESPONSES TO DETERMINE IF THE BURDEN HAS BEEN SHIFTED. IT IS NOT SHIFTED BASED ON DECEDENT'S TESTIMONY. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC., A CALIFORNIA VS. JOHN ARTHUR SEBASTINELLI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON FRIDAY, APRIL 11, 2008 LINE 6. PLAINTIFF KEARNEY STREET LAW OFFICES, INC.'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED AS DIRECTED AGAINST SEBASTINELLI'S CLAIMS BASED ON BEING A SHAREHOLDER. THE MOTION IS DENIED FOR FAILURE TO SHIFT THE BURDEN OF PROOF. KEARNEY ACKNOWLEDGES THAT A PROFESSIONAL CORPORATION MAY PLACE STOCK IN TRUST AND ABSENT THE TRUST AGREEMENT, DEFENDANT CANNOT SHOW THIS HAS FAILED TO OCCUR. THE KALLER DECLARATION ALSO CREATES A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT ON THIS ISSUE. THE MOTION IS DENIED AS TO THE OTHER CLAIMS. BANKRUPTCY IS A CONDITION OF ENFORCING SECTION 3.7 AND THAT HAS NOT BEEN SHOWN TO HAVE OCCURRED. SECTION 3.5 IS VAGUE AND AMBIGUOUS AND ON ITS FACE, CANNOT BE CONSTRUED TO BAR SEBASTINELLI'S CLAIMS AGAINST KEARNEY. THE PROVISION APPEARS TO RELATE CLAIMS BY THE BANK AGAINST THE BORROWER AND HOW THE BANK DISCHARGES THE DEBT. =(302/PJM/AY)
